title: Vanila World Generation Reloaded+ (VWGR+)
description: This modpack is continuation of VWGR! The modpack contains FPS Boosting mods, new structures and new biome mods to enhance minecraft. Thanks for downloading!
body:
This modpack project is continuation of [VWGR!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanila_world_reloaded)

A collection of mods that enhance world generation, adds new biomes and structures to the game, while keeping the vanilla feeling! For exploration experience this modpack includes:


**Biomes O' Plenty** is an expansive biome mod for Minecraft that adds a slew of new, unique biomes to the Overworld, Nether, and End! To go along with the new biomes, it adds new plants, flowers, trees, building blocks, and much more!

**Terrestria** is a detailed and vibrant biomes mod for Minecraft. Terrestria enhances gameplay through the addition of major biomes supported by component biomes, new wood types, as well as providing a refreshing new selection of terrain!

**Regions Unexplored** is a biome mod that overhauls the overworld in many ways. With many new biomes to explore and plenty of new things to see!

**Lio's Overhauled Villages** This mod is a transformation that brings a more modern and lively atmosphere to villages!

**Explorify** - A simplistic, vanilla-friendly collection of new structures!

**Hearths** - Hearths is that adds new features and structures to the vanilla Nether!

**Repurposed Structures** - Adds more variations of vanilla structures and features!

I also added **Dungeons and Tavern's** Stronghold, Ancient city, Witch Hut and Nether Fortresses to the modpack to upgrade vanila's structures!

For sounds and ambient I added:

**Ambientsounds** - Which enhances the biome ambient sounds.

**Sound Physics Remastered** - Provides realistic sound attenuation, reverberation, and absorption through blocks.

**Sounds** - This mod allows to add different sounds for different blocks items and UI sounds.

Our pack has optifine parity so that means you can use this modpack as optifine!

And many more! Download the modpack and see yourself

**This Modpack doesn't add new mobs to the game!**

**Attension!** The Modpack adds new blocks and new biomes to the game! However if you want to play that modpack without new blocks and new biomes to keep your feelings to updated, then check out [VWGR!](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanila_world_reloaded)

**ANNOUNCEMENT! If this modpack reaches 100 downloads I'll upload better building mods for** **builders and map makers i'll upload 2 versions: first one is adding new blocks and second one** **is keep the feeling of vanila style! So if you don't wanna miss out download the modpack and** **follow me!**

Thanks for all of you guys supporting and downloading!

If any questons or something is wrong with modpack, Please report all of us to: hardmann18.yt@gmail.com

(IDK why but if you press that it doesn't work, send gmail instead)

**Thanks!**
